# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/*
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          limit: 1000
          window_size:
            - 60
          policy: local
    upstreams:
      - name: user-service-upstream
        hosts:
          - host: user-service-1
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
          - host: user-service-2
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
        hash_on: ip
        hash_fallback: none

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /orders
          - /orders/*
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
    upstreams:
      - name: order-service-upstream
        hosts:
          - host: order-service-1
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
          - host: order-service-2
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
        hash_on: ip
        hash_fallback: none

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-route
        paths:
          - /products
          - /products/*
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          allow_origins:
            - "*"
          allow_methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          allow_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
    upstreams:
      - name: product-service-upstream
        hosts:
          - host: product-service-1
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
          - host: product-service-2
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
        hash_on: ip
        hash_fallback: none

  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: payment-service-route
        paths:
          - /payments
          - /payments/*
        methods:
          - POST
          - GET
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: jwt
        config:
          claim_headers:
            - name: api-key
              value: key
    upstreams:
      - name: payment-service-upstream
        hosts:
          - host: payment-service-1
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
          - host: payment-service-2
            port: 8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round-robin
        hash_on: ip
        hash_fallback: none
